zh.Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾阿希布恩
zh.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion於1301年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓時，他的父親William Kniveton of Ashbourne26歲，母親Margery26歲。他於1324年與Joan Herbert在英國德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1390年在他的家鄉享年89歲。

zh-hans.Ashbourne, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾阿希布恩
zh-hans.Mercaston, Derbyshire, England: 英国德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion于1301年出生在英国英格兰德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓时，他的父亲William Kniveton of Ashbourne26岁，母亲Margery26岁。他于1324年与Joan Herbert在英国德比夏爾梅爾卡斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1390年在他的家乡享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Kniveton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Kniveton (Derbys) or Kneeton (Notts).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion was born in 1301, in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Kniveton of Ashbourne, was 26 and his mother, Margery, was 26. He married Joan Herbert in 1324, in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1390, in his hometown, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion est né en 1301, à Mercaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Kniveton of Ashbourne, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margery, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joan Herbert en 1324, à Mercaston, Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1390, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion 1301 in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Kniveton of Ashbourne 26 und seine Mutter Margery 26. Er hat 1324 in Mercaston, Derbyshire, England Joan Herbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1390 im Alter von 89 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion è nato il nel 1301 nel Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Kniveton of Ashbourne, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Margery, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Joan Herbert nel 1324, nel Mercaston, Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1390, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastionが1301年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストンで生まれた時，父William Kniveton of Ashbourneは26歳，母Margeryは26歳であった。1324年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアメルカストンでJoan Herbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1390年に故郷で89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion(이)가 1301년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 머카스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Kniveton of Ashbourne(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1324년 영국 더비실르 머카스턴에서 Joan Herbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1390년 그의 고향에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion nasceu em 1301, em Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Kniveton of Ashbourne, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Margery, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Herbert em 1324, em Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1390, em sua cidade natal, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion родился в 1301 г. в местности миркастон, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Kniveton of Ashbourne было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Herbert в 1324 г. в местности миркастон, дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1390 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas I Kniveton Knight of Mercastion nació en 1301, en Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Kniveton of Ashbourne, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Margery, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Joan Herbert en 1324, en Mercaston, Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1390, en su pueblo, a la edad de 89 años.
